content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of positive integers A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äč,A1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1‚Äč and a sequence of non-negative integers C0,C1,‚Ä¶,CN‚ąí1C_0, C_1, \ldots, C_{N-1}C0‚Äč,C1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CN‚ąí1‚Äč. Let's denote M=998244353M = 998244353M=998244353. You know that for
Ci=‚ąĎj=0N‚ąí1BjAjimod‚ÄČ‚ÄČMC_i = \sum_{j = 0}^{N-1} B_j A_j^i \mod MCi‚Äč=‚ąĎj=0N‚ąí1‚ÄčBj‚ÄčAji‚ÄčmodM
holds for each valid iii, with some coefficients B0,B1,‚Ä¶,BN‚ąí1B_0, B_1, \dots, B_{N-1}B0‚Äč,B1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚ąí1‚Äč (such that 0‚Č§Bi<M0 \le B_i \lt M0‚Č§Bi‚Äč<M for each iii). Your task is to find these coefficients.

It is possible to prove that under the given constraints, the solution is unique.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1A_0, A_1, \ldots, A_{N-1}A0‚Äč,A1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1‚Äč.
